ul.li: Frame header: 24B prefix containing pgno (4B) and size (4B).
Concurrency Invariant: EXCLUSIVE lock prevents SQLITE_BUSY on checkpoint thread by blocking new readers/writers.
Persistence: fsync() must occur before ftruncate to ensure data integrity.
Error Path: If SQLITE_IOERR occurs during migration, checkpoint aborts; WAL remains valid for subsequent retry.

g.title: Orchestrates frame validation and page migration
Orchestrates frame validation and page migration
